item_specifications.special_feature: Durable, Easy to Clean, Non Skid Bottom, Removable Cover, Waterproof

about_item: Waterproof & Easy to Maintain: Crafted from soft, diamond-quilted velvet, this durable dog bed is seam-free to resist scratches and bites. Enclosed in a PVC waterproof layer, it effectively protects the foam from pets' urine or accidental spills, simplifying the cleaning process

Removable Washable Cover: Equipped with a high-quality L-shaped zipper, the big dog bed cover is easily detachable and machine washable, promoting a hygienic environment for your pet. Kindly note that the foam insert cannot be washed

Upgraded Non-Slip Base:The dog mattress features an upgraded anti-slip bottom for stability. The bottom and side fabric is lining with waterproof layer to prevent leaks and moisture, ensuring a cozy and comfortable resting spot

Orthopedic Egg-Crate Foam: Designed with high-density egg crate foam, our XL dog bed provides optimal support, excellent joint protection, and increased airflow, relieving pressure points for a restful sleep

Extra Large Dog Bed Size：Measuring 41 x 27 x 3.5 inches, this dog crate bed is suitable for dogs weighing up to 80 pounds, perfect for medium and large breeds.This large dog bed arrives vacuum-sealed; please allow 6 hours for it to fully expand to its optimum thickness

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed well-made and comfortable, particularly noting it's perfect for XL dog crates and puppies, with one customer mentioning it's great for dogs with hip replacements. The bed is super soft with firm foam, easy to wash, and offers good value for money. While some customers report it holds up through multiple washesings, others mention the cover tearing within a week.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed to be well-made and appreciate that their dogs love it.

examples.snippet: Great bed aside from it definitely not being waterproof. Our senior dog had an accident on it and it went all the way through to the foam....
Great dog bed!!!
Great. Good quality, wash well. Be sure to zip before washing; zippers don't hold up well otherwise.
...Nice, firm foam. Waterproof cover has not failed so far, and has undergone two cat urination incidents without leaking through to the foam....

insights.title: Fit
insights.summary: Customers find that the dog bed fits perfectly in their pets' cages and crates, particularly noting it works well for XL dogs and puppies.

examples.snippet: Great price. Great fit and color..love the removable washable cover..really good quality soft and comfortable....
I love this bed. It fits perfectly in the kennel, and the zipper on two sides makes it relatively easy to get the pad back inside after the wash....
Great bed. Fits perfectly in the dog crate. Since we have a puppy I wrapped it in pee pads then put on the water repellent cover....
...Has a zipper to take off the padding which is water proof making it easy to wash!...

insights.title: Comfort
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed comfortable, particularly noting that puppies look cozy in it, and one customer mentions it works well for a puppy with hip replacement.

examples.snippet: ...the last time from this company years ago and it still was comfortable. I think Emily won't notice a difference because there is no difference....
...The mattress is pretty thick and comfy. The zipper can be tucked so your dog won't chew it and doesn't feel cheap....
...It seems to be very comfortable and the fabric is soft. The cover unzips easily to wash and is very easy to get back on after washing....
Very durable and comfy dog bed, both my dogs enjoy it daily especially my husky German shepherd

insights.title: Washability
insights.summary: Customers appreciate that the dog bed is easy to wash, with a removable cover that cleans well even for minor soiling, and one customer mentions it's simple to put in the washing machine.

examples.snippet: ...The material is a micro suede like material, easy to clean. Zipper for removing to wash. The sponge keeps its form too!
...My dogs love to sleep on them and the cover is easy to wash and waterproof. Good product for the cost.
...Would be nice to be able to order replacement cover since they are washable and I could have one extra one while washing the other....
...Perfect size. Love the fact that is is waterproof with a washable cover! She is still a puppy and she also tries to dig in the bed....

insights.title: Softness
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed soft and cushioned, with one customer noting that the firm foam provides good comfort for their pets.

examples.snippet: ...The cover is nice and soft and the egg crate seems substantial enough, she just doesn’t like it . Once it expands , you can’t repackage it ....
I purchased two of these for my fur babies. They are very soft and the dogs seem to like them....
This is a very nice dog bed. It is thick and firm, yet cushy enough for comforting my dogs....
Nice soft yet firm bed for my Pit when she comes in the house.

insights.title: Value for money
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed offers good value for money.

examples.snippet: Great price. Great fit and color..love the removable washable cover..really good quality soft and comfortable....
Nice bed for the price
good value
Why did you pick this product vs others?: great for the price, washable. dog loves it

insights.title: Size
insights.summary: Customers like the size of the dog bed, finding it very good and large enough for dogs weighing up to 30 pounds.

examples.snippet: Wonderful quality and the perfect size. It has a waterproof layer under the top layer. That is a great asset. Highly recommended. Very well-made....
Great material, size and comfortable for my pet. It was easy to put together and removing the covering was simple for cleaning purposes.
I measured my dog but this bed is too small for her . She’s only about 40 lbs , but she won’t sleep on this bed ....
Large and comfortable for your dog

insights.title: Durability
insights.summary: Customers have mixed experiences with the dog bed's durability, with some finding it very durable and noting it holds up through machine washing, while others report that the cover tears within a week of use.

examples.snippet: ...Seem nice and sturdy and should hold up well over time and the foam isn't likely to sag or get worn out.
My dog ripped the cover on this bed the very first day. we will be returning
Thick and durable. This is our 3rd bed and this one we bought for the travel crate.
Dog tore it up within 6 hours of it being in his crate with him.

authors_reviews.title: Great price and quality
authors_reviews.text: Great price. Great fit and color..love the removable washable cover..really good quality soft and comfortable. Also fits perfectly in the kennel and looks great anywhere. I think the foam, its thickness and design, provides good support for the dog.
authors_reviews.author: Svetlana

authors_reviews.title: Great bed
authors_reviews.text: Easy to remove cover and wash, fits perfect in kennel, comfy
authors_reviews.author: Eaton’s

authors_reviews.title: Dogs Loved New Bed
authors_reviews.text: My dogs loved it. They took one step on and they did not leave the bed unless they had to. I will be repurchasing if I need to buy another one.Mainly got it for my older dog because she’s got some arthritis in her shoulder, but my you get dog seemed fond of the new bed too.Package came vacuum sealed and was easy to fit into waterproof sleeve. It appears sturdy and my dogs are no scratchers or biters so I think it’ll last us a while.
authors_reviews.author: Jenny

authors_reviews.title: A bit on the firm side, but should last.
authors_reviews.text: Dogs do fine on these. I have 2 labs at about 85lbs each (and they are adorable!). they are 8 and 6 years old so they are starting to become very discerning about their bedding. These are a touch firm for them, but I always want to err on the side of firm vs too soft. Seem nice and sturdy and should hold up well over time and the foam isn't likely to sag or get worn out.
authors_reviews.author: Discerning Older Guy

authors_reviews.title: Nice thick support with quality quilted cover.
authors_reviews.text: I purchased 2 of these for our 80 lb catahoula leopard dog girls. Fits perfectly in their crates which measure 48x30x33. The mattress take a day to completely fluff up. They are nice and thick with a good quilted zippered cover. Has tiny rubber like dots on the bottom to help keep it from sliding. I still use waterproof elasticized crib mattress covers on them to make a quick cleanup & wash easier. This adds a comfy layer & protects the integrity of the mattress & quilted cover. I purchased the 4” and it works well for my girls with decent support. No weird smells. Arrived rolled up and compressed in a vacuumed bag, then another bag & inside a box. Good purchase!
authors_reviews.author: quest

authors_reviews.title: Great product
authors_reviews.text: Great bed. Fits perfectly in the dog crate. Since we have a puppy I wrapped it in pee pads then put on the water repellent cover. I think people don’t understand the difference between water repellent, and waterproof. This is water repellent and water does bead on it until you can wipe it off. Even if he wasn’t a puppy I think I’m going to keep a pee pad between the foam and cover.
authors_reviews.author: Kathryn Davis

authors_reviews.title: Worth the money
authors_reviews.text: Perfect size! They love them! Very soft and comfortable!
authors_reviews.author: Michaela

authors_reviews.title: A good one.
authors_reviews.text: Fits our 40 pound golden doodle perfectly.Good quality.
authors_reviews.author: TAngell

other_countries_reviews.title: Quase perfeita
other_countries_reviews.text: Muito boa! Mas poderia ser maior meu idosinho ficou meio pra fora..mas ele adorou
other_countries_reviews.author: Fernanda Andrade

other_countries_reviews.title: Muy buena
other_countries_reviews.text: Tiene casi un mes que le compre esta cama a mi perro que pesa 30 kilos y uan conserva la forma la calidad de la cama es buena.Solo hay que seguir las instrucciones dejarla que recupere su forma cuando se saca del empaque
other_countries_reviews.author: Moisés M.

other_countries_reviews.title: I’m happy if my dog BEA is happy
other_countries_reviews.text: Bit smaller than I realised it would be but my 12 months old kelpie Cross loves it sleeps on it all the time. I don’t regret my purchase.
other_countries_reviews.author: Pieter Rietkerk

other_countries_reviews.title: Funcional
other_countries_reviews.text: Es tal cual el anuncio, además de ser impermeable. Me hubiera. Gustado que el hule espuma tuviera una funda aparte de la externa, ya que con otras marcas así es más práctico. Muy suavecito y funcional
other_countries_reviews.author: Cristhian Castillo

other_countries_reviews.title: Parecr cumplir con su funcion
other_countries_reviews.text: Llegó bien y rápido. Funciona bien, no diré que el perro la adora pero es bastante bien
other_countries_reviews.author: Ixchel
